summary: Iteration 34 - TV Dashboard sidebar link and TV user testing complete. Backend: 3/3 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 8/8 UI tests passed (100%). All requested features verified: TV Dashboard link in sidebar under SISTEMA section with external link icon, opens in new tab (target=_blank), TV user login works with viewer role, and TV Dashboard displays fullscreen without sidebar.

backend_api: POST /api/auth/login with tv@86bit.it / Tv86bit!2026 - Returns 200 OK with role='viewer'
POST /api/auth/login with admin@86bit.it / password - Returns 200 OK with role='admin'
frontend_ui: TV Dashboard link visible in sidebar under 'SISTEMA' section
TV Dashboard link has Monitor icon (from @phosphor-icons)
TV Dashboard link is <a> tag with target='_blank' (opens in new tab)
TV Dashboard link has rel='noopener noreferrer' for security
TV Dashboard link has external link icon indicator (small arrow SVG)
TV user has role 'viewer' displayed in sidebar footer
TV user sees limited menu items (MONITORAGGIO, INFRASTRUTTURA, SISTEMA only)
/tv page shows all TV Dashboard components (stats, client cards, alerts, low toner)

critical_code_review_comments: Layout.js line 124: TV Dashboard nav item correctly has external:true property
Layout.js lines 192-207: External items render as <a> with target='_blank' and external link icon
Layout.js line 124: TV Dashboard roles correctly set to ['admin', 'operator', 'viewer']
App.js line 194: Route /tv correctly placed outside Layout (no auth wrapper)
tv_dashboard.py: API endpoint has no auth dependency - correct for TV display setup
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. TV user already exists in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified: 1) TV Dashboard link in sidebar under SISTEMA section with Monitor icon and external link indicator. 2) Link opens in new tab (target=_blank). 3) TV user (tv@86bit.it / Tv86bit!2026) can login with viewer role. 4) Viewer role sees limited menu (no Sicurezza, no Operazioni sections). 5) /tv page loads fullscreen without sidebar. All features working correctly.

mocked_apis.firebase_push: Firebase Cloud Messaging (push notifications) is MOCKED
